an1.1:1.1:
Thus have I heard. On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Sāvatthī in Jeta's Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika's Park. There the Blessed One addressed the bhikkhus: "Bhikkhus!"
"Venerable sir!" those bhikkhus replied. The Blessed One said this:
an1.1:1.2:
"Bhikkhus, I do not see even one other form that so obsesses the mind
of a man as the form of a woman. The form of a woman obsesses the mind of a man."
an1.2:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I do not see even one other sound that so obsesses the mind of a man as the sound of a woman. The sound of a woman obsesses the mind of a man."
an1.3:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I do not see even one other odour that so obsesses the mind of a man as the odour of a woman. The odour of a woman obsesses the mind of a man."
an1.4:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I do not see even one other taste that so obsesses the mind of a man as the taste of a woman. The taste of a woman obsesses the mind of a man."
an1.5:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I do not see even one other touch that so obsesses the mind of a man as the touch of a woman. The touch of a woman obsesses the mind of a man."
an1.6:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I do not see even one other form that so obsesses the mind of a woman as the form of a man. The form of a man obsesses the mind of a woman."
an1.7:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I do not see even one other sound that so obsesses the mind of a woman as the sound of a man. The sound of a man obsesses the mind of a woman."
an1.8:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I do not see even one other odour that so obsesses the mind of a woman as the odour of a man. The odour of a man obsesses the mind of a woman."
an1.9:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I do not see even one other taste that so obsesses the mind of a woman as the taste of a man. The taste of a man obsesses the mind of a woman."
an1.10:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I do not see even one other touch that so obsesses the mind of a woman as the touch of a man. The touch of a man obsesses the mind of a woman."
